title: Better GUI For TravelersBackpack
description: Let the interface, buttons, and inventory slots of the TravelersBackpack showcase the visual experience of CozyUI+.
body:
![Better GUI For TravelersBackpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b07098c5185a468bc5eab2529184d7751bf79a4.jpeg)

Material beautification source reference: CozyUI+. Please use with the corresponding material pack.

Version: neoforge 1.21.x，For other versions, please test independently and inform me of results.

Mod：**[travelersbackpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)**

Recommended for use Resource PacksI：**[CozyUI+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cozyui-plus)**
